VENKATESH KOTA
+91-7893396338 — kotavenkatesh2822@gmail.com
Summary
Detail-oriented Computer Science graduate with proficiency in Excel data management, SQL, and Python.
Strong communication and problem-solving abilities with experience coordinating schedules and maintaining

accurate records in fast-paced environments. Quick typing skills and comfortable with PowerPoint reporting.
Education
Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology Nov 2021 – May 2025

B-Tech in Computer Science CGPA: 7.8/10 Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
Gayatri junior college jun 2019 – mar 2021
MPC CGPA: 9.7/10 Gotlam, Andhra Pradesh
Experience

Experience
Kakinada Institute of Engineering and Technology (IQAC) 2023 – 2024
Academic Operations Coordinator Kakinada, AP

Academic Operations Coordinator Kakinada, AP
• Managed daily faculty scheduling and class assignments using Excel, ensuring optimal resource utilization and minimal
disruptions.

disruptions.
• Served as the primary point of communication between administration and faculty to resolve last-minute absences and
schedule changes.

schedule changes.
• Maintained accurate billing and attendance records while problem-solving real-time operational issues to keep
academic activities on track.
Projects

academic activities on track.
Projects
Food Delivery Application | React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Razorpay | GitHub

• Built a full-stack MERN application with secure authentication and Razorpay payment integration.
• Designed RESTful APIs for order and cart management, improving response time by 20%.

• Optimized database queries and backend performance to enhance scalability and user experience.
Employee Management System | React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB | GitHub

• Developed role-based system with JWT authentication and CRUD operations for employee records.
• Automated leave workflows, reducing manual administrative tasks.

• Enabled real-time data updates with seamless frontend-backend integration.
AI Chatbot using Gemini API | React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Gemini API | GitHub

• Created conversational chatbot with Gemini API integration for real-time query responses.
• Built RESTful APIs to handle user requests and generate dynamic replies efficiently.

• Optimized response flow to reduce latency and improve overall user experience.
Technical Skills
• Programming: Python, SQL, JavaScript
• Software: Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint

• Software: Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint
• Soft Skills: Communication, Problem Solving, Typing (Fast & Accurate)
Certifications & Achievements
• Full Stack Web Development – Edu Skills july–sep 2024
• Deep Learning – NPTEL july–oct 2023
